messages.subject: [R-sig-teaching] R codes/functions for test procedures
messages.body_plain:
Dear All:


I am sending this request to this group too hoping that someone can help.



I am wondering if someone have an R codes (R functions) to run the test
procedures described in the paper titled ?ESTIMATION AND COMPARISON OF
LOGNORMAL PARAMETERS IN THE PRESENCE OF CENSORED DATA? by STAVROS POULOUKAS
2004, Journal of Statistical Computation & Simulation, Vol. 74, No. 3,
March 2004, pp. 157?169.


I can send a copy of the paper if necessary.



with many thanks

abou
______________________


*AbouEl-Makarim Aboueissa, PhD*

*Professor, Statistics and Data Science*
*Graduate Coordinator*

*Department of Mathematics and Statistics*
*University of Southern Maine*

	[[alternative HTML version deleted]]

messages.subject: [R-sig-teaching] R codes/functions for test procedures
messages.body_plain:
This list is for discussions about using R in teaching statistics.  It
isn't a help line where you ask people to write code for you.  You can ask
on the main list, or on stack overflow for help with coding.  Please only
use this list for its intended purpose.

with many thanks
abou

messages.subject: [R-sig-teaching] R codes/functions for test procedures
messages.body_plain:
>>>>> Jeff Laux 
>>>>>     on Mon, 30 Aug 2021 07:38:54 -0400 writes:

    > This list is for discussions about using R in teaching
    > statistics.  It isn't a help line where you ask people to
    > write code for you.  You can ask on the main list, or on
    > stack overflow for help with coding.  Please only use this
    > list for its intended purpose.

Yes, indeed!

Notably since you (Prof AbouEl-Makarim Aboueissa)
*already* posted this to the R-help list and you  *did* get some
help there!

What you just did is indeed considered to be a misuse of
volunteers' time.

Martin Maechler
